headline: A Look At CBRE Group (CBRE) Valuation After Recent Share Price Pullback
summary: Why CBRE Group (CBRE) Is On Investors’ Radar Today CBRE Group (CBRE) is drawing fresh attention after recent trading saw the stock post mixed returns, with a monthly gain alongside a decline over the past 3 months and year to date. See our latest analysis for CBRE Group. The recent share price pullback, including a 3.02% 7 day share price return and an 11.47% year to date share price decline from $141.81, contrasts with CBRE Group's 12.58% 1 year total shareholder return and stronger multi...
